header.description: Extract information from text in a structured format

text.description: The text to extract information from

schemaType.description: How to specify the schema for the desired output

fromAttributes.description: Extract specific attributes from the text based on types and descriptions

fromJson.description: Generate a schema from an example JSON object

jsonSchemaExample.description: Example JSON object to use to generate the schema

notice.displayName: All properties will be required. To make them optional, use the 'JSON Schema' schema type instead

inputSchema.description: Schema to use for the function

systemPromptTemplate.description: String to use directly as the system prompt template

batching.description: Batch processing options for rate limiting

batchSize.description: How many items to process in parallel. This is useful for rate limiting, but might impact the log output ordering.

delayBetweenBatches.description: Delay in milliseconds between batches. This is useful for rate limiting.
